name: Steel Trolley Diner's Fresh Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. Place the sliced apples in a large bowl and pour the flour mixture over them. Stir well to combine.
3. Transfer the apple filling into the prepared pie shell, spreading it evenly.
4. Cover with crumb topping. To make the topping, mix together 1/4 lb. butter, 1 cup flour, and 3/4 cup sugar until crumbly.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour or until done.
